summary: Iteration 9 - Complete UI/Navigation improvements testing. All features implemented correctly. Back buttons present on all internal pages (Services, Gallery, Videos, Staff, About, Contact, Booking, Customer Dashboard, Admin Dashboard mobile). Admin customers page has mobile card layout with accessible action buttons. Desktop layout and home page scroll working properly.
critical_code_review_comments: PageHeader component correctly implements back button with data-testid='back-button'
Services, Gallery, Videos, Staff pages use PageHeader component with back button
About, Contact pages have inline back buttons with specific data-testids
Booking page has back button with data-testid='booking-back-btn'
Customer Dashboard has back button with data-testid='dashboard-back-btn'
Admin Dashboard mobile header has back arrow with data-testid='admin-back-btn'
CustomersManagement has mobile card layout with data-testid='customers-cards-mobile'
Mobile card action buttons have proper data-testids: edit-customer-mobile-{n}, reset-password-mobile-{n}, delete-customer-mobile-{n}
CSS scroll fix applied with smooth scroll behavior and overflow handling
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI navigation improvements verified. Back buttons work on all internal pages. Admin customers page has mobile-friendly card layout with visible action buttons.
